//: Spellcheck for noorinalabs-design-system authored docs (#326). Scoped to canonical authored prose (CLAUDE.md, README.md, RUNBOOK.md, docs/brand + docs/usage, skills, charter) — the append-only records (feedback_log) and roster cards are excluded because they are dense with person names that would balloon the dictionary without catching real typos. Domain vocabulary and team names live in project-words.txt.
